response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates strong full-stack engineering experience with leadership roles in AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq) and cloud-native development (Optilyz), including direct experience with MCP frameworks relevant to the role. However, explicit experience with GenAI systems (e.g., RAG, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks) is not clearly documented on the resume, and the majority of prior work appears aligned with non-AI domains. The candidate's background in diverse languages and systems shows adaptability but lacks depth in the specific AI/cloud GenAI requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience with leadership in AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq) and cloud-native development (Optilyz)
Experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP) frameworks, directly relevant to the role's technical stack
Proven ability to lead technical projects across diverse domains and languages, demonstrating adaptability
concerns: Limited explicit experience with GenAI systems (e.g., RAG, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks) is not clearly evidenced in the resume
Majority of prior work appears aligned with non-AI domains, raising questions about depth in GenAI-specific engineering
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related field, which is listed as a preferred qualification

key_factors.factor: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Explicit GenAI system experience (RAG, vector databases, multi-agent systems)
Advanced degree in AI or related field
